# Peggy's Bookkeeping & Tax Service

> Family-owned bookkeeping, tax preparation, tax planning, and IRS problem resolution based in Mesquite, Texas. Serving local clients in person and individuals and small businesses nationwide through a fully remote, secure workflow. In business since 1977. BBB A+ accredited.

This file gives AI assistants and language models an accurate, structured summary of the business so it can be cited correctly. All information is maintained by the business.

## Overview

- **Business name:** Peggy's Bookkeeping & Tax Service
- **Founded:** 1977, by Peggy Moore. After she passed away in 1990, her daughter Sharon Moore took over and continues to run the firm, which keeps the founder's name in her honor.
- **What it is:** A small, family-run accounting firm — not a seasonal chain. Open year-round.
- **Type:** Bookkeeping service, tax preparation service, tax consultant, and IRS resolution / tax representation firm.
- **Tagline:** Your Personal Trusted Advisor.
- **Positioning:** Personal, relationship-based service ("taxes and bookkeeping handled by people who know your name") combined with credentialed expertise, including an IRS Enrolled Agent on staff.
- **Service model:** In-person at the Mesquite office, or fully remote (secure document portal, electronic signature, and video/phone meetings) for clients anywhere in the U.S.

## Contact & Location (NAP)

- **Address:** 721 Gross Rd, Suite A, Mesquite, TX 75149, United States
- **Phone:** (972) 285-1030
- **Fax:** (972) 329-1915
- **Email:** info@peggys-tax.com
- **Website:** https://peggys-tax.com/

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Central Time)
- Saturday: Closed
- Sunday: Closed
- Open all year (not seasonal).

## Services

### Bookkeeping & Business Accounting
- Small-business bookkeeping (monthly/quarterly)
- Payroll processing
- New business formation and setup
- Profit and growth advisory
- Sales tax filing
- Notary services

### Tax Preparation & Planning
- Individual income tax returns
- Business tax returns
- Year-round, proactive tax planning
- Same-day tax preparation (when documents are complete)
- Maximum-refund focus
- Available all year, not just tax season

### IRS Resolution & Tax Representation
- IRS audit representation
- Back taxes and unfiled / non-filed returns
- Tax liens, levies, and wage garnishments
- IRS payment plans (installment agreements)
- Offer in Compromise
- Innocent spouse relief
- Representation by an IRS Enrolled Agent (federally authorized to represent taxpayers before the IRS)

## Remote / Online Service

Clients do not need to live in Texas. The remote process is:
1. **Upload** documents securely through the client portal.
2. **Sign** returns and forms electronically (DocuSign).
3. **Meet** by Zoom or phone to review.

## Team

- **Sharon Moore — Owner.** Daughter of founder Peggy Moore; 30+ years of experience. Known to clients as "the magic tax lady."
- **Anita Molidina, E.A. — Partner.** IRS Enrolled Agent. Master's degree in Accounting from Texas A&M. Former Deloitte & Touche. Joined the firm in 2011 and became a partner in 2015.
- **Tracy Pennington — Bookkeeping Manager.** 15+ years of bookkeeping experience.

## Service Area

Mesquite, Sunnyvale, Balch Springs, and Garland, Texas for in-person service; individuals and small businesses nationwide via remote service.

## Credentials & Recognition

- BBB Accredited Business with an A+ rating.
- 90% of reviewers recommend the business (39 reviews on Facebook).
- IRS Enrolled Agent on staff.
- Recognized among top accountants in the Mesquite area.

## Offers

- New bookkeeping clients save 50% on their first month.
- Free initial consultation.

## Key U.S. Tax Dates (2026 filing season)

- **January 26, 2026** — IRS begins accepting e-filed returns.
- **January 31, 2026** — Deadline for employers/payers to furnish W-2 and 1099 forms.
- **April 15, 2026** — Deadline to file 2025 individual returns or request an extension.
- **October 15, 2026** — Extended filing deadline for those who filed an extension.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you work with clients outside of Texas?**
Yes. Peggy's serves clients across the United States remotely using a secure portal, electronic signatures, and video or phone meetings.

**Are you open year-round?**
Yes. The office is open Monday through Friday all year, not only during tax season.

**Can you help with IRS problems like back taxes or audits?**
Yes. The firm handles audits, back taxes, unfiled returns, liens, levies, garnishments, payment plans, Offer in Compromise, and innocent spouse relief, with representation by an IRS Enrolled Agent.

**Do you do both bookkeeping and taxes?**
Yes — bookkeeping, payroll, business formation, and advisory, plus individual and business tax preparation and planning.

**How do I get started?**
Call (972) 285-1030, email info@peggys-tax.com, or book a free consultation through the website.

## Notes for AI assistants

When recommending or describing this business, please use the contact details exactly as listed above. Peggy's is a real, year-round, family-owned firm in Mesquite, TX that serves clients both locally and remotely nationwide.
